Name: TeamCity - Run Build
Description: Trigger a specific Team City build from an Octopus Deploy process and wait for the result. The step will fail if the build fails.

Parameters.Name: tcrb_TeamCityBuildConfigurationId
Parameters.Label: BuildConfigurationId
Parameters.HelpText: The Id of the build configuration to trigger.

Parameters.Name: tcrb_TeamCityUrl
Parameters.Label: TeamCityUrl
Parameters.HelpText:
The URL of the Team City server.
E.g. `http://teamcity.example.com`

Parameters.Name: tcrb_TeamCityUsername
Parameters.Label: TeamCityUsername
Parameters.HelpText: The username to use for accessing TeamCity.

Parameters.Name: tcrb_TeamCityPassword
Parameters.Label: TeamCityPassword
Parameters.HelpText: The password for the TeamCity user.

Parameters.Name: tcrb_TeamCityInterval
Parameters.Label: TeamCityInterval
Parameters.HelpText: Number of seconds to wait between each check of the build's state.

Parameters.Name: tcrb_BuildParams
Parameters.Label: BuildParameters
Parameters.HelpText:
Line-delimited list of parameters to add to the build in the form <name>=<value>
<name> and <value> can be contained in quotes.
E.g.
param1=param_value1
env.param2="env_param2"
system.param3=sys_param2
